The '''''Empire''''', was a prototype [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] that served within the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. It was modified with [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|superior shielding]], and was [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Feyet Kiez|Kiez]].

==History==
The ''Empire'' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] with upgraded [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|superior shields]] . It was the finest [[Warship/Legends|warship]] ever within the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Fleet]]. Its crew was handpicked, and it was rumored they were the elite of the elite within the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].

At some point, [[Feyet Kiez]], recently promoted to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]], became the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of the [[Starship/Legends|ship]].

Within the next few years, the [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]] would be used to patrol star systems, and locate military staging areas. At some point, it would attack [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical ships]].

{{Ship-stub}}
